characters.name: Iron Man
characters.description: Wounded, captured and forced to build a weapon by his enemies, billionaire industrialist Tony Stark instead created an advanced suit of armor to save his life and escape captivity.

characters.name: Thor
characters.description: Thor is the Asgardian God of Thunder and the son of Odin, the All-Father.

characters.name: Captain America
characters.description: Vowing to serve his country any way he could, young Steve Rogers took the super soldier serum to become America's one-man army.

characters.name: Doctor Strange
characters.description: Dr. Stephen Strange is the Sorcerer Supreme, the primary protector of Earth against magical and mystical threats.

characters.name: Thanos
characters.description: The Mad Titan Thanos, a filtered through his obsession with Death, is one of the most powerful villains in the Marvel Universe.

characters.name: Loki
characters.description: Loki is the God of Mischief and the adopted son of Odin.

characters.name: Spider-Man
characters.description: Bitten by a radioactive spider, high school student Peter Parker gained the speed, strength and powers of a spider.

characters.name: Star-Lord
characters.description: Peter Quill is Star-Lord, the half-human, half-alien leader of the Guardians of the Galaxy.

characters.name: Storm
characters.description: Ororo Monroe is a mutant with the ability to control the weather.

characters.name: Wolverine
characters.description: Born with super-human senses and the power to heal from almost any wound, Wolverine was unwillingly transformed into a living weapon.

characters.name: Black Widow
characters.description: Natasha Romanoff is one of the most skilled spies and assassins in the world.

characters.name: Hulk
characters.description: Caught in a gamma bomb explosion while trying to save the life of a teenager, Dr. Bruce Banner was transformed into the incredibly powerful creature called the Hulk.
